summary: Add responsive sidebar width tiers and close direct EXECUTE grants on internal approval graph primitives.

notes: Migration 109 revokes authenticated/anon direct EXECUTE grants from internal approval graph primitives, including approve_node.
Domain RPCs such as psa_timesheet_action continue to invoke approval primitives through SECURITY DEFINER functions.
Desktop sidebar width is reduced from 232px to 216px.
Tablet and narrow desktop widths use a 64px icon-only rail with accessible labels and hover/focus tooltips.
Main content padding is reduced at medium widths to preserve usable workspace.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.6.
Run deploy/scripts/verify-jwt-keys.sh on the cloud host.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host before deployment.
After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.6.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.6.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
